prompt: Risk premium cue: tap left hole card (As).
why_v1: Hole-card anchor keeps hand reference stable before tournament-pressure action.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. As is the hole-card anchor, so the tournament read stays tied to the blocker cue that changes how much pressure your hand can carry.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. The ace of spades is the key hole-card anchor because it works as a blocker, removes some strong continuing hands, and changes how credible your pressure is when risk premium is high. Picking the wrong card loses that blocker read and the playability context that comes with it.
